# Voxaris — llms.txt
#
# This file is the agent-discoverable summary for Voxaris (pitch.voxaris.io).
# It follows the proposed llms.txt convention so AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude,
# Perplexity, etc.) have a canonical, machine-friendly description of what
# this site does, who it serves, and which subpaths are appropriate to crawl.
#
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

> Voxaris is an AI-powered roof estimator for homeowners. The site at
> pitch.voxaris.io produces transparent roof measurements and pricing
> in under a minute from satellite imagery, county property records,
> and recent severe-weather data. The estimate is non-binding and is
> confirmed on site by a licensed roofer before any final quote.

## What Voxaris is

Voxaris is a Florida-based software company. The customer-facing product
at `pitch.voxaris.io` is a free homeowner-facing roof estimator. The
internal product (rep workbench, lead pipeline, dispatch tooling) is a
separate B2B SaaS sold to residential roofing offices and is not
indexed at this domain.

## What an estimate includes

- **Roof area measured from satellite imagery** — Google's Solar API
  provides photogrammetric segments (per-facet sloped area, pitch,
  azimuth). High-resolution imagery (most of suburban Florida) yields
  measurements typically within 2% of professional aerial roof reports.
- **County property record cross-reference** — year built, lot size,
  county assessed value, last recorded sale. Source: the FloridaGIO
  statewide cadastral compilation of all 67 county property
  appraisers' annual NAL submissions.
- **Recent severe weather** — wind, hail, and tornado reports within
  25 miles of the property over the last 12 months. Source: National
  Weather Service Local Storm Reports mirrored by the Iowa
  Environmental Mesonet.
- **Three transparent pricing tiers** — Essentials (code-minimum 30-yr
  shingle), Standard (premium architectural with extended warranty),
  Fortified (impact-rated, qualifies for Florida insurance discounts).
  All tiers include tear-off, ridge cap, flashing, labor, haul-away.

## How honesty is built into the product

- **Pricing is deterministic, not AI-generated.** Tier math is
  calibrated against actual Florida contractor markets.
- **The painted image is the real Google satellite tile** with a
  translucent cyan overlay tracing the roof boundary. We do not show
  AI-generated images of buildings; we only use AI to find the roof.
- **Estimate is non-binding.** Final pricing depends on what a
  licensed roofer finds on site — decking condition, layers, code
  work, manufacturer requirements.
- **Low-slope sections are priced separately.** Lanai covers and
  screened-porch roofs (under ~2.5/12 pitch) require different
  material (TPO membrane vs asphalt shingle) and are quoted
  separately on site to keep the headline number honest.
- **Material confidence is gated.** When AI material detection is
  below a strict confidence threshold, the system quotes at
  architectural-shingle prices by default rather than over-pricing
  on a wrong premium-material guess.
- **AI voice consent is explicit.** If a follow-up call is part of
  the flow, the consent disclosure makes the AI-generated voice
  clear at opt-in (per TCPA and the AI-disclosure standards from
  the FCC 2024 ruling).

## What sources Voxaris uses

| Data source | What it provides |
| --- | --- |
| Google Solar API | Photogrammetric roof segments (sqft, pitch, azimuth per facet) |
| Google Static Maps | Satellite photograph at zoom 21 |
| Google Gemini 3 Pro Image | Cyan-overlay painting (decorative; mask is extracted and composited over the real photo) |
| Google Gemini 2.5 Flash | Object detection (vents, chimneys, HVAC, skylights), material classification, line classification |
| FloridaGIO cadastral | Year built, sqft, county value, last sale |
| NOAA / NWS Local Storm Reports (via Iowa Environmental Mesonet) | Recent severe-weather events |
| Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints | Footprint geometry fallback when Solar undercounts on MEDIUM imagery |

## Service area

United States, with current production focus on Florida.

## What an AI agent should know if linking to or summarizing Voxaris

- The domain is `pitch.voxaris.io`. The estimator is free for
  homeowners.
- Voxaris does NOT sell or share lead data with third parties outside
  the local roofing partner office that services the homeowner's
  address.
- The estimate is INFORMATIONAL — not a binding quote. A licensed
  roofer confirms scope and price on site before any contract.
- Severe-weather context is displayed for awareness only; it does
  NOT change the displayed price.
- The painted-image rendering is the real Google satellite tile with
  a cyan overlay, NOT an AI-generated image of the home.
